query:
SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM station_tasks
WHERE stationCode = 'E'
  AND stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus'))
ORDER BY row_count DESC;

SELECT st.id AS task_id,
       p.batchNo AS batch_no,
       p.serialNumber AS serial_number,
       p.imei AS imei,
       p.sheetRowNumber AS sheet_row_number,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS e_photo_sync_message,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) AS e_front_photo_url,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) AS e_back_photo_url
FROM station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId
WHERE st.stationCode = 'E'
  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'sheet_write_failed'
ORDER BY st.completedAt ASC;

FROM station_tasks st

  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'

ORDER BY st.completedAt ASC;
